summary: Plan-only PR inventory shard. The cluster preflight artifact could not hydrate live GitHub state for any listed ref because the GitHub installation hit API rate limits, so no close, label, comment, merge, or fix action is safe. Each listed item is kept independent for this shard pending a later hydrated run.
